title: Your AI Development Partner — and Training Ground
subtitle: About AIDT&D
description: AIDT&D (AI, Digital Transformation & Development) is an AI solutions studio and training provider. We build production AI applications and automations for businesses, and run structured programs that turn motivated learners into hands-on AI builders.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To make AI and automation skills truly accessible by combining hands-on projects, mentorship, and real client work so that learners don't just collect certificates – they become confident builders.
mission.details: We want every learner who passes through AIDT&D to ship something real: an agent, a bot, a workflow, or a tool that actually solves a problem for someone.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become a go-to hub where companies and individuals co-build the future of work with AI – a place where ideas move from "what if" to deployed systems, and where talent is constantly being discovered, trained, and empowered.
vision.details: We imagine a world where every team has access to practical AI and automation expertise, and every motivated learner can grow into that role with the right guidance and projects.

story.heading: Our Story
paragraphs: AIDT&D was born from a simple observation: there's a gap between what businesses need from AI and what most vendors or courses actually deliver.

Companies want production AI — applications that integrate with their data, agents that handle real workflows, and automations that don't fall apart after the first edge case. At the same time, students and career changers want practical exposure to real AI work, not just another certification.
AIDT&D sits in the middle: we build real AI applications and automations for businesses, and we run the training programs and internships that grow the talent capable of doing the same.

highlights.title: Build + Train:
highlights.description: We ship production AI for clients and run training programs on the same stack — both sides make each other stronger.

highlights.title: Project-first:
highlights.description: Every engagement — for clients or learners — is anchored in real deliverables, not slides.

highlights.title: Talent pipeline:
highlights.description: Interns and learners grow into contributors on live projects, bridging the gap between talent and industry.

services.title: AI Application Development
services.description: We design and build custom AI-powered applications for businesses — from internal tools and workflow automation to full-stack customer-facing AI products.
features: Custom AI apps with LLM & RAG backends

services.title: AI Agents & Automation
services.description: We build autonomous AI agents, RPA workflows, and intelligent document pipelines that save time and eliminate manual bottlenecks.
features: AI agents for support, ops & internal copilots
IDP for invoices, KYC, and forms
RPA bots for repetitive back-office work

services.title: Training, Internships & Co-build
services.description: We run structured learning programs and offer internships on live projects — and a co-build model where we upskill your team as we deliver.
features: Bootcamps on AI agents, RPA & full-stack AI

values.heading: How We Think & Work
paragraphs: Great AI and automation work is not just about tools – it's about understanding context, asking the right questions, and designing systems that people can actually use and maintain.
That's why we emphasise fundamentals, design thinking, and collaboration alongside hands-on exposure to platforms like OpenAI, LangChain, Automation Anywhere, and ABBYY.
Whether you're a learner or an organisation, our goal is the same: ship something meaningful, and ensure you understand how it works under the hood.

coreValues.title: Real over theoretical:
coreValues.description: If it doesn't ship or create value, it's only half done.

coreValues.title: Learn by doing:
coreValues.description: We believe the best way to learn AI & automation is by building and breaking real systems.

coreValues.title: Clarity over hype:
coreValues.description: We cut through buzzwords and focus on solid foundations and practical patterns.

coreValues.title: Shared growth:
coreValues.description: When our learners succeed, our partner companies succeed – everyone grows together.

cta.heading: Ready to Build Something with AI?
cta.description: Whether you need a production AI application, want to automate a workflow, are exploring internships, or want to upskill your team — we'd love to hear from you.
